questions.context_sentence: The mouse bit through the net.
questions.hint: bit成小块需要去**咬**。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: The mouse ____ through the net. (提示: 咬; 咬伤)
questions.cn: 老鼠咬破了网。

questions.context_sentence: Later, a hunter caught the lion in a net.
questions.hint: hunt打猎+er人=**猎人**。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 后来，一个猎人用网抓住了狮子。

questions.context_sentence: The mouse promised to help the lion.
questions.hint: pro向前+miss送：提前送出的话就是**承诺**。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 老鼠答应帮助狮子。

questions.context_sentence: The farmer's son didn't have to join the war.
questions.hint: 谐音“我”：**战争**中我们要保护我。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: The farmer's son didn't have to join the ____. (提示: 战争)
questions.cn: 那个农夫的儿子不必参战。

questions.context_sentence: Was the farmer wise?
questions.hint: 想要win赢就要很**明智的**。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 那个农夫聪明吗？

questions.context_sentence: Once upon a time, an emperor liked clothes very much.
questions.hint: empire帝国的统治者是**皇帝**。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: Once upon a time, an ____ liked clothes very much. (提示: 皇帝)
questions.cn: 从前，有个皇帝非常喜欢衣服。

questions.context_sentence: Two brothers came and lied to him.
questions.hint: 长鼻子就是因为爱**撒谎**。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 两个兄弟来了，并对他说了谎。

questions.context_sentence: They pretended to make the clothes.
questions.hint: pre前+tend伸展：在人前伸出假面具**假装**。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: They ____ to make the clothes. (提示: 假装; 伪装)
questions.cn: 他们假装在做衣服。

questions.context_sentence: The emperor's officials couldn't see the clothes.
questions.hint: 在office办公室工作的人是**官员**。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 皇帝的官员们看不到那件衣服。

questions.context_sentence: No one wanted to look silly.
questions.hint: 谐音“洗礼”：需要被洗礼因为太**傻的**。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 没有人想看起来很傻。

questions.context_sentence: The emperor decided to show everyone his new clothes.
questions.hint: de向下+cide切：一刀切下去做**决定**。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: The emperor ____ to show everyone his new clothes. (提示: 决定)
questions.cn: 皇帝决定向所有人展示他的新衣服。

questions.context_sentence: People in the street praised them.
questions.hint: 被raise举高高就是得到了**表扬**。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 街上的人们称赞他们。

questions.context_sentence: They were afraid to look silly too!
questions.hint: a一个+fraid谐音飞的：看到飞的虫子很**害怕的**。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 他们也害怕看起来很傻！

questions.meaning: 突然地; 出乎意料地
questions.context_sentence: Suddenly, a boy shouted, 'Look! The emperor has no clothes on!'
questions.hint: sudden突然+ly地：**突然地**。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: ____, a boy shouted, 'Look! The emperor has no clothes on!' (提示: 突然地; 出乎意料地)
questions.cn: 突然，一个男孩大喊：‘看！皇帝没穿衣服！’

questions.context_sentence: Why do you think the boy told the truth?
questions.hint: true真实的+th名词后缀=**真相**。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 你认为那个男孩为什么说了实话？

questions.meaning: 符合事实的; 真正的
questions.context_sentence: That can't be true!
questions.hint: 发音就是“出”，出来的就是**真正的**。
questions.title: Vocab Master
options: 符合事实的; 真正的
questions.cn: 那不可能是真的！

questions.meaning: 不喜欢; 厌恶; 讨厌
questions.context_sentence: I hate to be different.
questions.hint: 谐音“黑他”：**讨厌**一个人就要黑他。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: I ____ to be different. (提示: 不喜欢; 厌恶; 讨厌)
questions.cn: 我不喜欢与众不同。

questions.context_sentence: Once upon a time, a king asked an artist to paint him a horse.
questions.hint: King就是扑克牌里的老K：**国王**。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 很久以前，一位国王请一位艺术家为他画一匹马。

questions.context_sentence: Once upon a time, a king asked an artist to paint him a horse.
questions.hint: art艺术+ist人=**艺术家**。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 很久以前，一位国王请一位艺术家为他画一匹马。

questions.context_sentence: If anyone set me free, I would kill them.
questions.hint: any任何+one人=指代**某个人**。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: If ____ set me free, I would kill them. (提示: 任何人; 某个人)
questions.cn: 如果有人放我走，我会杀了他们。

questions.context_sentence: Quickly, the artist painted a beautiful picture of a horse.
questions.hint: quick快+ly地=**快速地**。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: ____, the artist painted a beautiful picture of a horse. (提示: 快速地; 很快)
questions.cn: 艺术家很快地画了一幅美丽的马的画。

questions.context_sentence: The artist smiled and took the king to his house.
questions.hint: S是弯弯的嘴角：**微笑**。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 艺术家笑了笑，然后带国王去了他家。

questions.context_sentence: What an ugly duckling!
questions.hint: 谐音“阿哥里”：丑阿哥里最**丑陋的**。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 多么丑的小鸭啊！

questions.context_sentence: Five of the ducklings were small and yellow.
questions.hint: duck鸭子+ling小=**小鸭子**。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: Five of the ____ were small and yellow. (提示: 小鸭子)
questions.cn: 五只小鸭子又小又是黄色的。

questions.context_sentence: Is the ugly duckling a real duck?
questions.hint: 谐音“锐哦”：这个钻戒很锐，是**真的**。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 丑小鸭是真的鸭子吗？

questions.context_sentence: So he decided to search for a new home.
questions.hint: sea海+rch找：在海里捞针去**寻找**。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 所以他决定寻找一个新的家。

questions.context_sentence: One day, the duckling met a cat and a hen.
questions.hint: 和pen钢笔一起记，用钢笔画**母鸡**。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: One day, the duckling met a cat and a ____. (提示: 母鸡)
questions.cn: 有一天，小鸭子遇到了一只猫和一只母鸡。

questions.context_sentence: May I stay with you? he asked hopefully.
questions.hint: hope希望+fully满满地=**有希望地**。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 我可以和你在一起吗？他充满希望地问。

questions.context_sentence: They did not like him because he could not purr or lay eggs!
questions.hint: 拟声词：猫满足时发的**呼噜声**。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 他们不喜欢他，因为他既不会发出咕噜声，也不会下蛋！

questions.context_sentence: They did not like him because he could not purr or lay eggs!
questions.hint: 谐音“累”：母鸡**下蛋**很累。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: They did not like him because he could not purr or ____ eggs! (提示: 下(蛋); 放置)
questions.cn: 他们不喜欢他，因为他既不会发出咕噜声，也不会下蛋！

questions.context_sentence: There, he saw three beautiful swans with long necks and white feathers.
questions.hint: s湾+wan弯的脖子：脖子弯弯的**天鹅**。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: There, he saw three beautiful ____ with long necks and white feathers. (提示: 天鹅)
questions.cn: 在那儿， he saw three beautiful, with long necks and white feathers 天鹅。

questions.context_sentence: There, he saw three beautiful swans with long necks and white feathers.
questions.hint: 长得像father：鸟类爸爸有好看的**羽毛**。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 在那儿，他看见三只美丽的，有着长脖子和白色羽毛的天鹅。

questions.context_sentence: How was the ugly duckling different from the other ducklings in size and colour?
questions.hint: 买衣服要看**尺寸** (size)。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 丑小鸭在体型和颜色上与其他小鸭子有什么不同？

questions.context_sentence: I couldn't believe my eyes!
questions.hint: 中间有lie谎言，但还是需要去**相信**。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: I couldn't ____ my eyes! (提示: 相信; 认为)
questions.cn: 我简直不敢相信我的眼睛！

questions.context_sentence: Once upon a time, a fisherman caught a bottle in his fishing net.
questions.hint: fish鱼+er人+man男人=**渔夫**。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 很久以前，一个渔夫在他的渔网里捕到了一个瓶子。

questions.context_sentence: Once upon a time, a fisherman caught a bottle in his fishing net.
questions.hint: fish鱼+ing现在分词=**捕鱼**。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 很久以前，一个渔夫在他的渔网里捕到了一个瓶子。

questions.context_sentence: A great cloud came out and became a genie!
questions.hint: 灯神**精灵**也是魔法天才 (genius)。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: A great cloud came out and became a ____! (提示: 妖怪; 鬼精灵)
questions.cn: 一大片云飘出来变成了一个精灵！

questions.context_sentence: Prepare to die! shouted the genie.
questions.hint: 谐音“带”走：人被死神带走了就是**死亡**。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 准备去死吧！神怪喊道。

questions.context_sentence: If someone set me free, I would make them rich and powerful.
questions.hint: some一些+one人=指代**某个人**。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 如果有人放我自由，我会让他们变得富有而强大。

questions.meaning: 使处于某种状况; 置放
questions.context_sentence: If someone set me free, I would make them rich and powerful.
questions.hint: 谐音“设”：设置好，就是**置放**。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: If someone ____ me free, I would make them rich and powerful. (提示: 使处于某种状况; 置放)
questions.cn: 如果有人放我自由，我会让他们变得富有而强大。

questions.context_sentence: If someone set me free, I would make them rich and powerful.
questions.hint: 日吃海喝的人肯定是非常**富有的**。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: I would make them ____ and powerful. (提示: 富有的)
questions.cn: 如果有人放我自由，我会让他们变得富有而强大。

questions.meaning: 强大的; 有影响力的
questions.context_sentence: If someone set me free, I would make them rich and powerful.
questions.hint: power力量+ful满满的=**强大的**。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: 强大的; 有影响力的
questions.cn: 如果有人放我自由，我会让他们变得富有而强大。

questions.context_sentence: His neighbours said, 'How unlucky!'
questions.hint: 谐音“内部”：内部旁边的人是**邻居**。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 他的邻居们说：“真倒霉！”

questions.context_sentence: At last, fortune smiles upon us!
questions.hint: up上+on在：就在......之**上**。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: At last, fortune smiles ____ us! (提示: 在......上)
questions.cn: 终于，好运降临到我们身上了！

questions.context_sentence: Later, a hunter caught the lion in a net.
questions.hint: Internet互联网的**网**。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 后来，一个猎人用网抓住了狮子。

questions.context_sentence: Would the fisherman succeed in saving himself?
questions.hint: him他+self自己=**他自己**。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 渔夫能成功地救自己吗？

questions.context_sentence: Do you agree with what the fisherman and his wife did?
questions.hint: a大+gree绿+with和：大绿和别人都**同意**。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: Do you agree ____ what the fisherman and his wife did? (提示: 赞成; 同意)
questions.cn: 你同意渔夫和他的妻子所做的事情吗？

questions.context_sentence: Once upon a time, an emperor liked clothes very much.
questions.hint: 故事的经典开头：**从前**。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 从前，有个皇帝非常喜欢衣服。

questions.context_sentence: They stopped laughing when a boy told the truth.
questions.hint: tell告诉+truth事实：**说实话**。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 当一个男孩说了实话，他们停止了笑。

questions.context_sentence: It bit through the net, and the lion got out.
questions.hint: get得到+out出=**离开**。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: It bit through the net, and the lion ____ out. (提示: 逃脱; 离开)
questions.cn: 它咬断了网，狮子跑了出来。
